statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

article.description: Rod Mills scored 14 points and Miami (Ohio) made 5 of 6 free throws in the final 33 seconds to slip past Lipscomb for a 70-68 win Friday night.
article.headline: Mills scores 14 as Miami (Ohio) slips past Lipscomb, 70-68
article.linkText: Mills scores 14 as Miami (Ohio) slips past Lipscomb, 70-68
article.story: OXFORD, Ohio -- Rod Mills scored 14 points and Miami (Ohio) made 5 of 6 free throws in the final 33 seconds to slip past Lipscomb for a 70-68 win Friday night. Eli Pepper's free throw with 10:29 left gave Lipscomb (2-3) a 54-49 lead but Miami score 11-straight points, including a 3-pointer by Mills, to open up a 6-point lead. Brett Wishon hit a 3 to pull the Bisons within 1 with three minutes left. The teams traded 3-pointers before a jumper by Mills and two free throws by Eric Washington made it 67-62 with 21 seconds remaining. Wishon hit another 3-pointer but Miami (2-1) made 3 of 4 free throws in the final 16 second to seal it. Josh Williams, who led Lipscomb with 19 points, hit a 3-pointer as time expired. Wishon scored 16. The Redhawks made 18 of 25 free throws while Lipscomb made 2 of 4.
